aoa-adr-write.notes: Writes bounded decision artifacts into canonical repository surfaces.

aoa-approval-gate-check.notes: Explicit-only because it classifies authority boundaries before risky work.

aoa-bounded-context-map.notes: Analytical boundary-mapping skill with no direct runtime mutation.

aoa-change-protocol.notes: General bounded change workflow for non-trivial code, config, and docs work.

aoa-commit-growth-seam.notes: Packages one honest local commit boundary after a bounded diff is already ready, while keeping push, publish, and release as separate follow-on routes.

aoa-contract-test.notes: Writes boundary checks or tests without requiring elevated runtime authority.

aoa-core-logic-boundary.notes: Refactoring guidance for separating reusable logic from glue code.

aoa-dry-run-first.notes: Preview-first workflow that should remain explicit because it fronts mutating operations.

aoa-invariant-coverage-audit.notes: Audit-only skill for checking whether invariants are truly covered.

aoa-local-stack-bringup.notes: Explicit-only because local stack launch can create side effects beyond simple file edits.

aoa-port-adapter-refactor.notes: Architecture refactor skill for isolating concrete dependencies.

aoa-property-invariants.notes: Adds invariant-oriented tests or checks to a codebase.

aoa-quest-harvest.notes: Leaf promotion-triage skill for one repeated reviewed quest unit after the wider session-harvest family has already done donor extraction or related post-session shaping.

aoa-session-donor-harvest.notes: Explicit-only nucleus skill for turning a reviewed session into a bounded HARVEST_PACKET, routing reusable outputs to the right owner layer, and handing off to later post-session family seams when needed.

aoa-checkpoint-closeout-bridge.notes: Explicit-preferred orchestration skill for carrying provisional checkpoint evidence into one reviewed closeout execution chain without turning aoa closeout run or checkpoint notes into hidden verdict authority.

aoa-summon.notes: Explicit-only bounded-child delegation skill for anchored parent routes with Codex-local defaults, hard progression and self-agent gates, and explicit return plus reviewed-closeout planning.

aoa-automation-opportunity-scan.notes: Explicit-only detector skill for classifying whether reviewed recurring work is honestly automation-ready without granting schedule, hidden runtime, or self-mutation authority.

aoa-session-route-forks.notes: Explicit-only post-session branch-analysis skill for making next-route options legible without turning fork cards into hidden routing policy.

aoa-session-self-diagnose.notes: Explicit-only reviewed-session diagnosis skill for classifying drift, proof debt, and ownership confusion before any repair is attempted.

aoa-session-self-repair.notes: Explicit-only checkpoint-governed repair-packet skill that stays smaller than a rollout and does not allow silent self-mutation.

aoa-session-progression-lift.notes: Explicit-only evidence-backed progression overlay skill for reviewed sessions that keeps growth legible without creating sovereign scores or hidden routing authority.

aoa-safe-infra-change.notes: Infrastructure and configuration changes remain explicit-only with rollback discipline.

aoa-sanitized-share.notes: Explicit-only because it handles potentially sensitive raw technical material.

aoa-source-of-truth-check.notes: Maps authoritative documentation surfaces and entrypoints.

aoa-tdd-slice.notes: Bounded test-first change workflow with explicit refactor limits.

atm10-change-protocol.notes: Project overlay for atm10 repositories only.

atm10-source-of-truth-check.notes: Project overlay for atm10 repository document authority.

abyss-safe-infra-change.notes: Project overlay for abyss repository operational changes with explicit local authority.

abyss-self-diagnostic-spine.notes: Project overlay for abyss runtime diagnosis normalization and honest owner-aware handoff without silent repair.

abyss-sanitized-share.notes: Project overlay for abyss repository sharing and sanitization surfaces.

titan-approval-ledger.notes: Record explicit operator approval for Forge mutation or Delta judgment gates without treating approval records as owner truth. Explicit-only Titan scaffold; owner repos retain stronger authority.

titan-approval-loom.notes: Maintain the app-server bridge approval queue while preserving Forge and Delta gates, receipts, and visible operator intent. Explicit-only Titan scaffold; owner repos retain stronger authority.

titan-appserver-bridge.notes: Operate the Titan app-server bridge as inspectable thread, turn, event, approval, replay, and metrics state without hidden execution. Explicit-only Titan scaffold; owner repos retain stronger authority.

titan-appserver-plan.notes: Generate an inspectable Titan app-server launch plan as JSONL or equivalent plan output without executing Codex. Explicit-only Titan scaffold; owner repos retain stronger authority.

titan-closeout.notes: Close a Titan service-cohort session with role, risk, provenance, gate, verification, and next-owner summary. Explicit-only Titan scaffold; owner repos retain stronger authority.

titan-console.notes: Open or maintain a visible Titan operator-console state while keeping Forge and Delta locked until approvals exist. Explicit-only Titan scaffold; owner repos retain stronger authority.

titan-event-replay.notes: Replay Titan bridge or console events into inspectable state without granting runtime authority to the replay result. Explicit-only Titan scaffold; owner repos retain stronger authority.

titan-memory-loom.notes: Initialize or update Titan Memory Loom records as candidate memory with source refs, confidence, and authority warnings. Explicit-only Titan scaffold; owner repos retain stronger authority.

titan-memory-prune.notes: Propose redaction, tombstone, or pruning candidates for Titan memory without silent deletion or canon rewrite. Explicit-only Titan scaffold; owner repos retain stronger authority.

titan-mutation-gate.notes: Gate Forge workspace-write work with explicit intent, target paths, prechecks, validation, and rollback or stop posture. Explicit-only Titan scaffold; owner repos retain stronger authority.

titan-recall.notes: Retrieve Titan candidate memory records with source, record id, authority note, confidence, and verification path. Explicit-only Titan scaffold; owner repos retain stronger authority.

titan-receipt.notes: Create, validate, note, or close Titan session receipts as witnesses rather than final truth. Explicit-only Titan scaffold; owner repos retain stronger authority.

titan-runtime-gate.notes: Activate Forge mutation or Delta judgment lanes only through matching explicit runtime gates on a Titan receipt. Explicit-only Titan scaffold; owner repos retain stronger authority.

titan-summon.notes: Begin an explicit Titan service-cohort session with Atlas, Sentinel, and Mneme active and Forge or Delta locked. Explicit-only Titan scaffold; owner repos retain stronger authority.

titan-thread-turn-binding.notes: Bind Titan bridge events, approvals, and replay state to explicit thread and turn ids for inspectable continuity. Explicit-only Titan scaffold; owner repos retain stronger authority.
